title: Different versions of Death
wikitext:
[]: Different versions of Death             Quote Post by whitefinger » Fri Oct 09, 2009 10:35 pm Sorry if this info is somewhere else on the forums - I couldn't find it. I know there are three versions of Death. The first contains new scenes that were eventually incorporated into the director's cut episodes, the second [Death(true)] had these scenes removed, and the third [Death(true)²] had some of the scenes put back in. Which scenes were put back in for Death(true)²? Wouldn't the original version of Death be considered the definitive version considering it contains the most footage? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 10, 2009 2:24 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1787 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3378 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6498 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=209217#209217

[]:             Quote Post by whitefinger » Sat Oct 10, 2009 11:23 am Thank you, thank you! I guess I fail at searching.

Article: Different versions of Death
[]: Different versions of Death             Quote Post by whitefinger » Fri Oct 09, 2009 10:35 pm Sorry if this info is somewhere else on the forums - I couldn't find it. I know there are three versions of Death. The first contains new scenes that were eventually incorporated into the director's cut episodes, the second [Death(true)] had these scenes removed, and the third [Death(true)²] had some of the scenes put back in. Which scenes were put back in for Death(true)²? Wouldn't the original version of Death be considered the definitive version considering it contains the most footage? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 10, 2009 2:24 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1787 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3378 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6498 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=209217#209217
